englishDefinitions: Traveling back and forth across a country in many directions.
Moving from place to place throughout a country.
persianTranslation: سرتاسر کشور را زیر پا گذاشتن
از این‌سو به آن‌سو رفتن در کشور
examples: The band spent a year criss crossing the country on tour.
We were criss crossing the country to visit family and friends.
Photographers were criss crossing the country to document the floods.
